actionCalls.name: Site_Add_with_DT_Core_MS_Self_Serve_Assign_OBS
actionCalls.label: Site Add with DT - Core MS Self-Serve Assign OBS

actionCalls.name: Site_Add_with_DT_Gov_SS_or_MS_Assign_OBS
actionCalls.label: Site -Add with DT - Gov SS or MS - Assign OBS

actionCalls.name: SS_DT_Gov_SS_or_MS_Assign_OBS
actionCalls.label: SS/DT - Gov SS or MS - Assign OBS

decisions.description: Check if Opp's Post Cw Stage should be OB Eligible or Onboarding In Progress
decisions.name: BNP_Post_CW_Stages
decisions.label: BNP Post CW Stages

rules.name: OB_Eligible_BNP_Needs_Intro_Call_Scheduled
rules.label: OB Eligible BNP - Needs Intro Call Scheduled

rules.name: OB_Eligible_Needs_Intro_Call_Completed
rules.label: OB Eligible - Needs Intro Call Completed

rules.name: Move_to_Onboarding_in_Progress_or_Completed
rules.conditionLogic: (( 1 AND 2 ) OR ( 5 OR 6 OR 7) ) AND ( 3 OR 4 )
rules.label: Move to Onboarding in Progress or Completed

decisions.description: if the parent Account id is populate, then go find all the accounts under that hierarchy to see if all other accounts are activated or still onboarding.
decisions.name: Check_if_it_s_Multi_site
decisions.label: Check if it's Multi-site

rules.name: Completed_Activated_for_SelfServe_DT
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 ) OR ( 1 AND 2 AND ( 7 OR 8 ) )
rules.label: Completed - Activated for SelfServe/DT

rules.name: SSPR_Collection_Not_Started_For_SelfServe_DT
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ( ( 2 AND ( 3 OR 4 )) OR ( 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 2 ) )
rules.label: SSPR Collection - Not Started For SelfServe/DT

rules.name: SSPR_Collection_Partial_Completed_For_SelfServe_DT
rules.label: SSPR Collection - Partial Completed For SelfServe/DT

rules.name: Onboarding_in_Progress_For_Self_Serve_DT
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND ( 2 OR 3 ) ) OR ( 1 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 )
rules.label: Onboarding in Progress For Self-Serve/DT

rules.name: Gov_Site_Add_SS
rules.label: Gov Site Add to Round Robin

rules.name: Saas_Site_Add_to_Round_Robin
rules.label: Saas Site Add to Round Robin

decisions.description: If OBE Override approval fields are populated, then check to see if the OBS Kick-off call is also scheduled, if yes then move to Opportunity Stage = Onboarding In Progress , if no then update opportunity stage to = OBE
decisions.name: is_OBS_KIck_off_Call_Scheduled
decisions.label: is OBS KIck-off Call Scheduled?

decisions.description: Check the Combined Funnel to see if the Owner is the Standard Onboarding Path Queue and the status of the Opportunity is Onboarding In Progress.
decisions.name: Is_Owner_Standard_Onboarding_Path_Queue
decisions.label: Is Owner Standard Onboarding Path Queue?

rules.name: SS_DT_Combined_Funnel_is_Standard_Onboarding_Path_Queue
rules.label: SS/DT Combined Funnel is Standard Onboarding Path Queue

decisions.description: Check if OB Eligible fields are completed, if yes move to Onboarding in progress, if no - set opp stage to OB Eligible
decisions.name: OB_Eligible_or_Next_Stage
decisions.label: OB Eligible or Next Stage

decisions.name: OB_vs_AE_Owned_at_Risk
decisions.label: OB vs AE Owned at Risk

rules.name: Onboarding_In_Progress
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 AND 7 AND ( ( 3 OR 4) OR ( 5 OR 6 ) OR 8 ) )
rules.label: Onboarding In Progress

decisions.description: Round Robin based on these requirements - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y5BWbU48G0mmG2rYhQT5Km-Lezd_SR5N50p8I2L6UA0/edit?tab=t.0
decisions.name: Single_Site_OR_Multi_Site_or_Site_Add
decisions.label: Single Site OR Multi Site or Site Add

rules.name: Gov_Core_Site_Add_Self_Serve
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND ( 4 OR 5 ) ) OR ( 1 AND 2 AND ( 6 OR 7 ))
rules.label: Gov/Core Site-Add Self-Serve

decisions.name: SS_DT_OB_vs_AE_Owned_at_Risk
decisions.label: SS/DT- OB vs AE Owned at Risk

rules.name: Copy_1_of_AE_Owned_at_Risk
rules.label: Copy 1 of AE Owned at Risk

decisions.description: Check which one of the Onboarding in Progress - sub-Post CW Status
decisions.name: SS_DT_Sub_Onboarding_in_Progress_Status
decisions.label: SS/DT - Sub Onboarding in Progress Status

rules.name: SS_DT_OBS_Owned_At_Risk
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 AND ( 3 OR 4 ) ) OR ( ( 5 OR 6) AND 4)
rules.label: SS/DT - OBS Owned At Risk

decisions.description: Check to see if on the School Object : Students, Staff and Parent Adding Stage Date Met fields are populated, and also if Billing was opted in then check the Rate Card Uploaded Date.
decisions.name: SSPR_Adding_Stage_Date_Met
decisions.label: SSPR Adding Stage Date Met?

rules.name: All_SSP_Fields_are_Null
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ( ( 2 AND ( 3 OR 4) ) OR ( 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 2 ) )
rules.label: All SSP Fields are Null

rules.name: Move_to_Next_Stage_OB_Eligible
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ( (( 2 OR 3 ) AND 4) OR ( 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8) )
rules.label: Move to Next Stage - OB Eligible

rules.name: Move_to_Onboarding_in_Progress
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 7 AND ( ( 3 OR 4 ) OR ( 5 OR 6) )
rules.label: Move to Onboarding in Progress

decisions.description: Check which one of the Onboarding in Progress - sub-Post CW Status
decisions.name: Sub_Onboarding_in_Progress_Status
decisions.label: Sub Onboarding in Progress Status

rules.name: X2_OBS_Owned_At_Risk
rules.conditionLogic: ( 1 AND 2 AND ( 3 OR 4 ) ) OR ( ( 5 OR 6) AND 4)
rules.label: 2 - OBS Owned At Risk

Flow.description: Based on the School Object, Sync Opportunity Post CW Stages 03.19.2025 - LK - Added new logic to take into account for new fields - Opp.Billing Opt Out Override (CB) and to check Opp.OBS Scheduled Call Date instead of Account.initial Account Setup Scheduled date. Requirements - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1LR9XoL8cfYVM9uoB6Jd_ZbCWYfxT85qXjB5J81m1Sjg/edit?tab=t.0 03.20.2025 -LK - Remove the requirement for Billing Training Schedueld date if billing at cw = opted in for the OB Eligible Stage. 03.21.2025 -LK - Added Additional CF Onboarding Funnel Stages for on the Onboarding in progress stage 03.24.2025 - LK -Update the partial SSPR logic , and Added Skip to Churn decision node. 04.10.2025 - LK - Updates the new checkbox field - Post CW Set by Automation to allow the flow to bypass the validation rule that prevents users from updating the Post CW Stages 04.14.25 - BW - Updated logic to populate the AE Owned at Risk vs OBS Owned at Risk during Onboarding In Progress stage 04.14.25 - BW - Updated the SSPR Collection to compare to Close Date on Opp 04.17.2025 - LK - Updated to eveluate for Open Cancel Case at any of the Post CW Stages. Added logic to the Standard path. 04.28.2025 - LK - Unresponsive Logic added, so if Post CW Status = Unresponsive, then don't evaluate the post cw stages. 05.05.2025 - LK - Added OBE Override Logic to the -SSPR Adding Stage Met Decision Node - to update the Opportunity Stage when Approved_Accelerated_Onboarding_Date__c or Approved_OBE_Override_Date__c is populated to OBE or Onboarding In Progress. 06.04.2025 - LK - Update Winback Logic for the SSPR Stage ( Update logic to treat the deal as a true winback only if the SSPR dates are more than 30 days before the Close Date.) 06.10.2025 - LK - Update logic to treat the deal as a true winback only if the SSPR dates are more than 4 days before the Close Date 07.16.2025 - LK - Add logic for self-serve and site add when training is declined

formulas.description: If anyone of the Billing Onboarding Status = Postponed, Unresponsive, SaaS At Risk, Billing At Risk, Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval, Requesting Opt Out Awaiting Approval, then Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and Post CW Stage = OBS Owned at Risk
formulas.name: BillingOnboardingStatusRISK
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Postponed"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"Unresponsive"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"SaaS At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Billing At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Opt Out - Awaiting Approval")), TRUE, FALSE)

formulas.description: If OBS on opportunity is empty, then stamp with the same OBS as the hierarchy
formulas.name: formOpportunityOBS

formulas.description: If anyone of the Saas Onboarding Status = Postponed, Unresponsive, SaaS At Risk, Billing At Risk, Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval, Requesting Opt Out Awaiting Approval, then Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and Post CW Stage = OBS Owned at Risk
formulas.name: SaasOnboardingStatusRisk
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Postponed"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"Unresponsive"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"SaaS At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Billing At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Trigger_Opp.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Opt Out - Awaiting Approval")), TRUE, FALSE)

formulas.description: if Approved_Accelerated_Onboarding_Date__c and Approved_OBE_Override_Date__c is blank then there is no OBE Override and all SSPR fields need to be evaluated. If one has a value, then this formula = true, that there is OBE Override.
formulas.name: varOBEOverride

Flow.interviewLabel: School - Subflow - Sync Opportunity Post CW Stages {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: School - Subflow - Sync Opportunity Post CW Stages

recordLookups.description: Get the Accounts that are still onboarding , if we find an account that is still onboarding, then update the
recordLookups.name: Get_All_Accounts_in_the_Hierarchy
recordLookups.label: Get Accounts in the Hierarchy

recordLookups.description: Check to see if the School Record Exist for the newly closed won opportunity. If yes, then go check the SSPR Collection Date Met fields to move the opportunity to the correct Post CW Stages
recordLookups.name: Get_Related_School
recordLookups.label: Get Related School

recordLookups.description: Get the Combined Funnel to update the OBS and the Owner for later on in the flow
recordLookups.name: Get_Working_Combined_Funnel
recordLookups.label: Get Working Combined Funnel

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Opp_to_AE_Owned_at_Risk
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to AE Owned at Risk

recordUpdates.description: If school object is not found, then we will update the trigger opp post cw stage to SSPR Collection and Post CW Status = Not Yet Started.
recordUpdates.name: DefaultSSPR_Stage
recordUpdates.label: DefaultSSPR Stage

recordUpdates.description: Set the Post CW Set by Automation checkbox to TRUE to allow the flow to update the Opportunity Stage to a Post-CW value (e.g., SSPR, OB, Onboarding in Progress, Completed) without triggering the validation rule.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Post_CW_Set_by_Automation_on_Opp
recordUpdates.label: Set Post CW Set by Automation on Opp

recordUpdates.name: SS_DT_Update_Opp_to_AE_Owned_at_Risk
recordUpdates.label: SS/DT- Update Opp to AE Owned at Risk

recordUpdates.name: SS_DT_Update_Opp_to_Billing_Activated_Saas_Incomplete
recordUpdates.label: SS/DT - Update Opp to Billing Activated, Saas Incomplete

recordUpdates.name: SS_DT_Update_Opp_to_OBS_Owned_at_Risk
recordUpdates.label: SS/DT- Update Opp to OBS Owned at Risk

recordUpdates.name: SS_DT_Update_Opp_to_Onboarding_In_Progress
recordUpdates.label: SS/DT - Update Opp to Onboarding In Progress

recordUpdates.description: If Saas is activated and Billing At CW = Opted and Billing Override = false, and Billing is not activated yet. Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and POST CW Status = SaaS Activated, Billing Incomplete
recordUpdates.name: SS_DT_Update_Opp_to_Saas_Activated_Billing_Not
recordUpdates.label: SS/DT- Update Opp to Saas Activated, Billing Not

recordUpdates.name: Update_Combined_Funnel_Owner
recordUpdates.label: Update Combined Funnel Owner

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Activated
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Activated

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Activated_SelfServe_DT
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Activated -SelfServe/DT

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Billing_Activated_Saas_Incomplete
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Billing Activated, Saas Incomplete

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Churned
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Churned

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Churned_SelfServe_DT
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Churned SelfServe/DT

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_OB_Needs_BNP_Intro_Call
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to OB - Needs BNP Intro Call

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_OB_Needs_BNP_Intro_Call_Rescheduling
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to OB - Needs BNP Intro Call Rescheduling

recordUpdates.name: update_Opp_to_OB_Needs_BNP_Intro_Completed
recordUpdates.label: update Opp to OB - Needs BNP Intro Completed

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_OBS_Owned_at_Risk
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to OBS Owned at Risk

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Onboarding_In_Progress
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Onboarding In Progress

recordUpdates.name: Update_opp_to_Onboarding_in_Progress_BNP
recordUpdates.label: Update opp to Onboarding in Progress - BNP

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Open_Cancel_Case
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Open Cancel Case

recordUpdates.description: If Saas is activated and Billing At CW = Opted and Billing Override = false, and Billing is not activated yet. Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and POST CW Status = SaaS Activated, Billing Incomplete
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_Saas_Activated_Billing_Not
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to Saas Activated, Billing Not

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_SSRP_Collection_No_Started
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to SSRP Collection No Started

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_SSRP_Collection_No_Started_SelfServe_DT
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to SSRP Collection No Started - SelfServe/DT

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_SSRP_Collection_Partially_completed
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to SSRP Collection Partially completed

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opp_to_SSRP_Collection_Partially_completed_SelfServe_DT
recordUpdates.label: Update Opp to SSRP Collection Partially completed - SelfServe/DT

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_OBS
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity OBS

recordUpdates.description: 04.17.2025 - LK - This logic was added to evaluate for open cancel cases post OBE / onboarding in process stages: Requirements: Update the Post CW Status logic to evaluate if a Cancel Case is open at any time Post CW (prior to activation). If a Number of Open Cancel Request Cases > 0, then the Opportunity Post CW Status should update to 'Open Cancel Case', during any Post CW Stage.
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Opp_Post_CW_Status_to_Open_Cancel_Case
recordUpdates.label: Update the Opp Post CW Status to Open Cancel Case

recordUpdates.description: 04.17.2025 - LK - This logic was added to evaluate for open cancel cases post OBE / onboarding in process stages: Requirements: Update the Post CW Status logic to evaluate if a Cancel Case is open at any time Post CW (prior to activation). If a Number of Open Cancel Request Cases > 0, then the Opportunity Post CW Status should update to 'Open Cancel Case', during any Post CW Stage.
recordUpdates.name: Update_the_Opp_Post_CW_Status_to_Open_Cancel_Case_SelfServe_DT
recordUpdates.label: Update the Opp Post CW Status to Open Cancel Case - SelfServe/DT

recordUpdates.name: Update_the_OPP_Stage_Onboarding
recordUpdates.label: Update the OPP Stage - Onboarding

recordUpdates.name: Update_the_OPP_Stage_to_OBE
recordUpdates.label: Update the OPP Stage to OBE

recordUpdates.name: Update_to_OB_Eligible
recordUpdates.label: Update to Opp Stage to OB Eligible
